package rulefixtures

// scenario for buffer_write_rune_ascii_literal: `bytes.Buffer.WriteRune('x')` for ASCII literals instead of `WriteByte`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule441PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario441Positive(records []Rule441PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
